title: Schema migration lock waits stalled workflow writes
failure_mechanism: A schema migration waited on incompatible database locks while workflow writes accumulated behind the blocked path, reducing event-consumer throughput without removing consumer capacity.
mitigation_summary: The backlog began to drain only after lock waits cleared and normal write throughput was observed; this record does not prescribe how to change a migration during a new incident.
timeline_summary: Write latency and lock waits rose after a migration started. Consumers remained available but could not complete dependent database writes quickly enough to keep up with incoming events.
narrative_safe: RelayOps workflow events backed up after a schema migration began. Consumers stayed healthy, but database write latency and migration lock waits increased. This is not equivalent to a consumer crash-loop incident unless capacity loss is independently confirmed.
